clues: KNOWN BY EVERYBODY BUT NOBODY ACTUALLY KNOWS THEM
ROLE MODEL WHOSE ROLES INCLUDE MODEL
TOWERING ICON WHO'S LESS THAN ONE FOOT TALL
I TELL YOU KEN THINKS SHE'S A DOLL
CAME OUT OF NOWHERE NOW IT IS EVERYWHERE
EASY TO GET INTO EVEN THOUGH THERE'S A BOUNCER
SOUR SPORT THAT GOOD SPORTS RELISH

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to the very first episode of Best Guess Live! All right, now you’ve probably heard some incredible news about Netflix over the past week or so, and I’m here to tell you it’s all true. You really can win big money playing Best Guess Live every weekday; you just have to be faster than the rest of the country. Tonight, you are all part of Best Guess Live history. There will never be another first episode of Best Guess Live until the inevitable reboot in 2047.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s how the game works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round, we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; now it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues to figure it out. After each clue, you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. We do not accept typos.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. And honestly, right now 8,000 players—these might be the best odds you’ve ever had to win. In fact, in my opinion, I think you should probably tell a friend right now to download the app and start playing so you have twice as good odds. But that’s just me, do what you want.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Now is your chance to do it though. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. Now, since this is such a historic moment, we want to see you guys playing. So, if it’s possible at some point, have someone in the room film you playing Best Guess Live and send us the video. Tag us on your socials with #BestLive, and we’ll happily watch all of them. Enough talk, though; let’s start giving away some money!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: All right, round one. 8,316 players in the room. This round is worth $5,000. I mean, where else do you have those odds for $5,000? Let’s load the crystal ball. Okay, and that is what you’re trying to figure out. I wish you guys the best of luck. Let’s go ahead and play. Here is your first clue.
Clue 1: GLOBAL MULTIMEDIA STAR. (20 seconds on the clock starts now.)

It’s interesting… This is the first clue of clues. This is the first 20 seconds of 20 seconds. I guess none of you have been hosting this show in trials for the past year, so it’s more of a me finding it interesting thing. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Clue number one was GLOBAL MULTIMEDIA STAR. I can see your answers. Avery said “Dua Lipa.” Mint Spiral 671 said “Justin Bieber”—definitely a global multimedia star. Space Girl Mandy said “Logan Paul.” Someone else said “Cher.”
Clue 2: KNOWN BY EVERYBODY BUT NOBODY ACTUALLY KNOWS THEM. (20 seconds starts now.)

You’re going to learn that these clues build upon each other, and they eventually reveal something very clearly. In the beginning, it’s a hard guess to make, but who knows who’s going to get it. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Dairybox Diva 686 said “Banksy,” the graffiti artist. That is known by almost everybody, but nobody actually knows them. Great answer. Pwos 21 said “Marshmello,” the DJ. Miss M’s 916 said “Sia.” And then Best Sigzy970 said “Siri.”
Clue 3: ROLE MODEL WHOSE ROLES INCLUDE MODEL. (20 seconds starts now.)

It is not too late to play! We’ve gained hundreds of players since this first puzzle started, so you can still enter in your answer. But there’s another clue coming, so even if you got it wrong, stay around for the next puzzle worth $10,000. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Scaly Nutmeg 174 said “Tyra Banks”—a role model whose roles include model, that’s very accurate. Another person said “Alexa.” Neems 212 said “Madonna.” And then Clement Fuel 471 said “Kim Kardashian.”
Clue 4: TOWERING ICON WHO’S LESS THAN ONE FOOT TALL. (20 seconds starts now.)

I don’t think Kim is that tall, but is she less than one foot? I’ve never met her in person. Sia… I think she’s fairly average height. Trying to think who else that could be under one foot. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: 644 of you submitted on clue number four. ADHD Tweety Bird said “Tinkerbell.” Gentle Leak said “Minion.” Known by everybody but nobody actually knows them… and then It’s Red 0204 said “Yoda.” Yoda cannot be less than 12 inches tall! That’s like the most popular movie in the world; you should have known that.
Clue 5: I TELL YOU KEN THINKS SHE’S A DOLL. (20 seconds starts now.)
This is your last clue, your last chance. About 5,000 of you have submitted answers so far, which means 5,000 of you haven’t. Last chance! Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: I said the last one was a gimme, and Sherry Neiel 12 said “Ken.” I like you thinking that I gave you the answer in the middle of the clue. Bold move, but let’s see what was actually inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The answer was BARBIE. Very clear towards the end. But again, it doesn’t matter if you got it right; it matters who got it right on the earliest clue.
Clue 5: "I TELL YOU KEN THINKS SHE'S A DOLL." of course it's made by Mattel and there's Ken. 3,600 got it right.
Clue 4: "TOWERING ICON WHO'S LESS THAN ONE FOOT TALL." she's very small. 357 got it right.
Clue 3: "ROLE MODEL WHOSE ROLES INCLUDE MODEL." Role model to young girls, is a model. 110 got it right.
Clue 2: "KNOWN BY EVERYBODY BUT NOBODY ACTUALLY KNOWS THEM." Known by everybody but nobody actually knows them. 2 got it right.
Clue 1: "GLOBAL MULTIMEDIA STAR." Global Multimedia Star. 2 got it right.
Clue 1: 2 winners at $2,500.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Hunter March, thank you, Hunter! Wow, you’re a tough act to follow, but I think doubling the prize to $10,000 for round two will help. This is very exciting! You know how it works: five clues, 20 seconds, and only one best guess. Let’s load this crystal ball.
Clue 1: CAME OUT OF NOWHERE, NOW IT IS EVERYWHERE. (20 seconds starts now.)

lines.speaker: You should be telling people
lines.text: it came out of nowhere, now it’s everywhere! What do you think it is? It’s a group game; I wouldn’t play this alone. I want one person to walk away with $10,000 on the first night! Wouldn’t that be amazing? Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Empty Frog said “AI.” Came out of nowhere, now it’s everywhere—that’s true. I personally have no eye anyway. Canary Eel 716 said “snow.” Standing in Los Angeles, it’s not everywhere!
Clue 2: CAUSES INTENSE EXCHANGES BETWEEN FRIENDS. (20 seconds starts now.)
First night, I want everybody to win. I can’t believe it, we have almost 9,000 people playing! We’ve been practicing with like three people; it’s so much better to have 9,000. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: 3,500 guesses already. A Little Mug says “a meme.” Omar Coming 512 says “money.” It was nowhere, now it’s everywhere. You think you won, didn’t you, Omar? I hope you’re right.
Clue 3: EASY TO GET INTO EVEN THOUGH THERE’S A BOUNCER. (20 seconds starts now.)
Record yourself! Maybe we could play the videos. I’ll look at all your videos! I had no idea it would be this successful. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Audio Yak 514 said “club” because there’s a bouncer in a club. They were nowhere, and now clubs are everywhere. I wish I was a member.
Clue 4: SMALLER SERVINGS, MASSIVE POPULARITY. (20 seconds starts now.)
Remember, spelling counts! Even if you think you know the answer, make sure you spell it right. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Reputation said “sushi.” Well, they are smaller servings. Maybe that could be good appetizers. We’re into food; a lot of people are hungry!
Clue 5: SOUR SPORT THAT GOOD SPORTS RELISH. (20 seconds starts now.)
This is your final chance to guess today! Tomorrow I would go to a huge crowd and ask everybody to help. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: 6,179 submitted answers. Somebody said “tennis,” somebody said “whiffle ball.” Let’s find out what it was.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It’s PICKLEBALL! Let’s take a look at how the clues fit.
Clue 5: "SOUR SPORT THAT GOOD SPORTS RELISH." Sour pickles. You see what we did here. 740 got it right.
Clue 4: "SMALLER SERVINGS MASSIVE POPULARITY." It's a much smaller... it's not like that kind of serve. 123 got it right.
Clue 3: "EASY TO GET INTO EVEN THOUGH THERE'S A BOUNCER." You get it it's good for everybody anybody can play... and it bounces. 60 got it right.
Clue 2: "CAUSES INTENSE EXCHANGES BETWEEN FRIENDS." That's an ex that was that was Was that intense. 8 got it right.
Clue 1: "CAME OUT OF NOWHERE NOW IT IS EVERYWHERE." I never heard of pickle ball 5 years ago and now everybody's playing pickle ball. 10 got it right.
Clue 1: 10 winners at $1,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: We just want to thank everyone at Netflix and our incredible staff and crew. Congratulations again to all of our winners. We’re here live every weekday at 8:00 Eastern, 5:00 Pacific. If you had fun, tell a friend. Join us tomorrow when we’ll have two new puzzles and another $15,000 to give away. Good night everybody!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Hunter March. Tonight we have almost 10,000 people in here already and it is only going up. Want to shout out some first-time players: we got Story 75, we got Dorcas—or it’s Darkness, I think it’s Dorcas—and SassyC 25. And then Billy, welcome back, second night in a row.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Speaking of second night, last night we had two winners on our very first puzzle who got the answer right on the very first clue. And to make it even crazier, those two winners live in the same house! It’s unbelievable, but here’s the proof… 345 right there. That is crazy! They both guessed Barbie with the least amount of information we’ve ever given anybody. But they deserve it. Thank you guys for sharing that video. The rest of you should have somebody film you while playing Best Guess Live and then you send it in. Use the hashtag #BestLive, send it to us. Whoever films you, whoever already loses, if they’ve lost the game, their job is camera operator.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Anyway, now is your chance to get in the game and take your share of $15,000. You just have to beat every other person in America, especially those two girls. Here’s how the show works: each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’ll load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. And we do not accept typos. Last night a bunch of people thought Barbie was spelled with a Y… we saved untold dollars. Anyway, everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize spot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: All right, let’s start giving away some money. 12,000 players. This round one is worth $5,000. All right, let’s load the crystal ball with the first secret item. There it is… shiny, mystical, magical.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here comes

clue number one. I’m excited for this. Uh, let’s—before we do that, I actually want to chat with you guys for a brief second about how exciting it would be to win. We showed you the video earlier, but in fact, you know, how about I get a piece of paper in here right now… Oh, if you don’t have it… Uh, okay. We actually might have the wrong puzzle loaded up. Don’t worry about it, we’re going to fix it right now. This is part of a day-two struggle, people. Uh, if you see the puzzle… Oh, you guys don’t even see it yet. If I gave it to you right now, the clue would have been the clue from yesterday. You guys would all win until we get it loaded up though, which I actually know some of it, but we want to make sure we get it right. Okay, we’ve got it here now. All right, nobody left. I can see there’s still 12,482 of you.
Here’s your first clue.
Clue 1: ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK. (20 seconds on the clock starts now.)

Enter at your own risk. I think that’s an appropo clue for just this entire game show. Five seconds left. If you want to go for that first clue, win that first clue glory, I wish you the best of luck. Otherwise, you can wait. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: 1,700 people guessed. Wacky Zebra 6767 said “cave.” Worthy Sailor 418 said “Jaws.” And then someone said “Gatherer Mar”—oh that’s their name—they said “poker.”
Clue 2: BACK AND FORTH BILLIONS OF TIMES. (20 seconds starts now.)
Back and forth billions of times. Okay, could be poker if you have a problem. Five seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Less guesses on this one. Sarah XO Gold said “Maize” from Allentown, Pennsylvania. Someone I’ll call “Fat Finger” said “ocean.” I’m sure it does go back and forth billions of times with the waves.
Clue 3: KNOW IT ALL WHO’S STILL LEARNING. (20 seconds starts now.)
12,616 players. 5,006 submitted guesses already. Has anyone got it right? Last night might have been a fluke, who knows. People might not get it right till clue number five. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Miss Jess 479 from Greenwood, Arkansas said “Men.” She deserves all of the winnings! Somebody else said “internet,” somebody said “debate.”
Clue 4: HELPS WRITE YOUR RESUME BUT MAY TAKE YOUR JOB. (20 seconds starts now.)

15 seconds left. We have “know it all who’s still learning,” “men,” “back and forth billions of times”… You also do have to go back and forth billions of times with men just to get them to put dishes the right way. At least that’s what my fiance says about me. Time’s up.
Clue 5: OPEN AI HAD A BOT. (20 seconds starts now.)

Clue 5: How does the thing go… what is it a parody of… “E-I-E-I-O.” Oh, “Open AI had a bot.” Anyway, “Open AI had a bot, A-I-A-I-O.” Listen, that is so belittling. I messed up Old MacDonald. I am a know-it-all who is still learning. This is your last chance. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go ahead and see what was inside the crystal ball. The answer was CHATGPT. Specifically, you had to get that one. The last clue, Open AI, actually gave it to you.
Clue 5: "OPEN AI HAD A BOT." Open AI the company that invented chat GPT. 719 got it right.
Clue 4: "HELPS WRITE YOUR RESUME BUT MAY TAKE YOUR JOB." Helps write your resume but may take your job. 584 got it right.
Clue 3: "KNOW IT ALL WHO IS STILL LEARNING." I think men was the right answer but apparently 91 other people got the actual right answer. 91 got it right.
Clue 2: "BACK AND FORTH BILLIONS OF TIMES." People have had billions of interactions with Chat GPT. 1 got it right.
Clue 1: "ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK." You have to hit enter And then you have to double check your answers on Chat GPT Make sure they're accurate Enter at your own risk. 1 got it right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: This round is worth even more: $10,000. Let’s load our crystal ball. I’m not going to make it as easy.
Clue 1: NATURAL BUT NOT NATURAL. (20 seconds starts now.)
Wow, “Dum Dum”… Oh, that’s funny, their name is Dum Dum too. I just realized they thought it was Dum Dum, but really it’s just Dum Dum. Five seconds left. Time is up.

lines.text: 173 guesses. Good Vapor 165 said “gas.” Elbell said “Makeup.” Your girl Snoopy said “Hair.” My co-host has some of the most natural hair you’ll ever see.
Clue 2: CLASSIC ROCK GROUP THAT’S STILL TOGETHER. (20 seconds starts now.)
10 seconds left. Definitely less guesses this time. I told you I was going to make it a harder puzzle. Is this going to be our first puzzle where someone doesn’t get it on the first try? Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: Renee 2001 said “AC/DC.” Oasis, they’re back together. U2, always been together. Rush… too young to know a lot about them, but I know they have a big fan base.
Clue 3: 1 3 26 16 BINGO. (20 seconds starts now.)
A lot of numbers. Good luck. 12,000 people playing. 13 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.text: Stout Pegasus 220 said “Korn”—the band. If there is a song by Korn that has “1 3 26 16 BINGO” in it, I’ll give you something. Eel Lurman 999 said “ZZ Top.”
Clue 4: THE ULTIMATE FACE OFF. (20 seconds starts now.)
I have a guess… I also know the answer, but I also have a guess as to what I would have guessed at this point. Time is up.

lines.text: Sable Spirit 530 said “Queen.” Maybe between their original singer and their new singer. “Wink Chicken Den”—whatever—said “lips.” Weird Curve 914 said “ABBA.”
Clue 5: DAKOTA HILLS POTUS GRILLS. (20 seconds starts now.)
Final clue for your chance at $10,000. There are still 4,000 of you that haven’t guessed. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was MOUNT RUSHMORE! Pretty insane, you guys did a great job.
Clue 5: "DAKOTA HILLS POTUS GRILLS." Yeah we kind of gave it to you It's in Dakota Hills The POTUS faces. 127 got it right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: That’s it for this episode of Best Guess Live! Congratulations to all of our winners. Join me back here tomorrow. Bring a friend—if you’re smart, make it one of those two girls that won yesterday; they seem to know what they’re doing. Tell your friends about it, you’ve got more chances to win. Good night!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! That’s right, the show where everyone is a winner as long as you win. Well, don’t worry about that. Anyway, I’m your host Hunter March. We’re off to an amazing start. Over 30 people have won big money already and it’s only day three. There’s more to come. Now’s your chance to get some of the cash. You just have to be faster than—oh my gosh, 12,297 other players who are playing right now. Good luck!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s how the game works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item. Now it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. And make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. We do not accept typos. Mount Rushmore threw a lot of people for a lot of loops. “Mount who knows rushmore,” get out of here.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Anyway, everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. If you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. And we’ve heard from winners; the best part is when you think you got it right and you’re waiting to see how many people got it right too. I hope that happens to you. And if it does, if you think you’re going to win, or if you think you’re going to lose and you’re going to have a good reaction, make sure to film it. We love it. Send it to us with the hashtag #BestLive. Send it to me at Hunter March, send it to Netflix Games. Anyway, you got to be fast, you got to be right. I think I’m ready to start giving away some money. Let’s do it!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round one. There are 14,000 players in here right now. Round one is worth $5,000. And remember there’s a second round right afterwards worth $10,000, so stay tuned for that. Let’s load the crystal ball with our first secret item. Oh my god, oh look at that thing! Oh it’s so gold, it’s so beautiful. It’s a ball of possibility, it’s a ball of money for you guys. Here comes your first clue.
Clue 1: CAN FEEL ENDLESS. (20 seconds starts now.)

Okay the timer’s going. We’re not playing games anymore. You guys get how the show works. Can feel endless… I can only imagine what jokey answers I’m going to get for this, but I hope someone actually wins it. Who knows. 5 seconds left. We got four more clues after this. All right, time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: 2,261 people locked in their guess. We got a lot of people saying “time.” Whiskey Vixen said “time.” Mustard Fizz said “summer”—sometimes summer does feel endless, and then you get a job and it feels way too short.
Clue 2: RULES DO NOT APPLY. (20 seconds starts now.)

4,500 people guessed on the first clue. I love the boldness! Good on you guys. There’s 14,600-something people playing right now. Rules do not apply. That is your second clue. Can feel endless, rules do not apply. Interesting. Okay, time is up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: I got a lot more guesses in there. Desi 27 said “Love.” I don’t know if Desi’s in a good relationship or a bad one, but it can feel endless either way. Horned Mink said “Water.” Caged Goldfish said “sleep.” I’m a sleepwalker, so rules definitely do not apply.
Clue 3: HAS MULTIPLE PERSONALITIES. (20 seconds starts now.)

If you’re just joining us, it’s not too late for you to submit your best guess. Who knows if someone’s got it right yet. We’ll find out at the end. And again, reminder: there’s a $10,000 puzzle coming up right after this. Has multiple personalities… “Love” is back in if you’ve been with any of my exes! All right, time’s up.

lines.speaker: Recap
lines.text: On clue number three, Dya80 said “Weather.” Sunny Osborne 35 said “people.” True! Wow, that is so true. And then someone else said “Oh” from King of Prussia, Pennsylvania. I highly doubt that’s a real place.
Clue 4: CUE THE GADGETS. (20 seconds starts now.)

Okay, not giving you guys time to think anymore. We’re going right at this baby. Clue number one: can feel endless. Clue number two: rules do not apply. Clue number three: has multiple personalities. Clue number four: cue the gadgets. Let’s see how many people get this right. We’ve got 8,000 submitted answers so far, and time is up.

I’ll take an Aston Martini, shaken not stirred. Cue the gadgets, has multiple personalities, rules do not apply, can feel endless. Those are your five clues. And these are your last five seconds. I beg of you, get in your answer. There’s no point in leaving it blank. Time is up.

Highly anticipated. For those of you who maybe it’s your first night, welcome. These are riddles that build upon each other. The first clues are there to help you out, and then each clue builds upon itself until we get to one concrete answer. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host, Hunter March. It’s Glasses Thursday! Put your glasses on; I’m tired of pretending I don’t have an astigmatism. We’re deep into our first week, and I just want to say it is way more fun giving away all this money than I could have ever imagined. Thank you guys for all the comments and feedback; we’re thrilled that you’re enjoying the show. Keep it coming! We’re not just playing a game here; we’re building a little community—a community where a lot of money is being given away, the best type of community.

We’re also playing a game, so let’s go over the rules. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round, we’re going to load our crystal ball with a SECRET ITEM. Now, that SECRET ITEM could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue, you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round. Not one per clue—one best guess per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in, because we do not accept typos.

Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. If you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. And remember, if possible, I would love it if you guys could film yourselves playing. Have a friend film you, or film it on your computer, and share it with the hashtag #bestguesslive. I think you guys got it; I’m ready to start giving away some money.

Shout out to some winners from our last few nights: Jedi Knight, Odin’s Finest, Sunflower, and Madam Amazing. I wish you guys the best of luck. Round 1 is worth $5,000. Let’s go ahead and load the crystal ball with the first SECRET ITEM.

lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Hunter March. It’s been nuts around here since we announced that we’re giving away a million dollars next week. Before we get into it, we had some great winners last night. One of them, Darth Kent9, won over $1,600. And then of course, as some of you guys saw—those of you who were playing yesterday—we had someone take home the $10,000 prize on the first clue last night with “Bowling,” which I know is a wild first guess, but he posted on Reddit of all places and I saw it. He said that he had a bowling league that night and it was the first thing on his mind, and it’s incredible. He seems great. He’s a delivery driver and he didn’t think he won after he put in that first guess. But then he came back to his phone and I was announcing his name which was, by the way, very inappropriate, which is why I didn’t announce it in the show. I will say that he has a horrible name, so don’t do that.

It’s going to be incredible. We just want to help you guys for the holiday season, right? We’re just giving away some money. We really appreciate you guys being here. So let’s do it! But let’s not get ahead of ourselves. Tonight, before we get to the big one next week, we got $15,000 to give away, which is still a lot of money. lines.text: Here’s how it works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! No, Hunter didn’t shave his head—I’m Howie Mandel. Happy Friday! It’s prime time on the East Coast, drive time on the West Coast, and winning time absolutely everywhere. It’s also fight time right here on Netflix—the Jake Paul vs. Anthony Joshua fight is starting soon. So before you go watch that battle, let’s have a battle of our own right here! I am so excited; this is my first time hosting by myself since we launched. It’ll be nice to get some reps in before we play for a million dollars next week!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Wait, wait, wait… we’re playing for a million? Really? A million dollars next week! Talk about a holiday surprise. This is amazing. A million dollars! Talk about a deal—see what I did there? And you don’t have to win a million dollars; it’s all up to you people. It’s not a lottery, it’s easy! Am I allowed to play? Well, listen to this: not only is a million dollars up for grabs next week, but I have $15,000 to put on the table right now. And I don’t even have a table, so hopefully I put it into your pocket.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here’s how it works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load the crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything. Then I will give you five clues. You get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win the entire prize pot for that round. Can you imagine next week if somebody won a million? Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #BestGuessLive.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: All right, let’s start giving away some money. Round one is worth $5,000. Please, can somebody load the crystal ball for me for that first secret item? Wow, ask and ye shall receive. What could it be? All right,

Clue 1: MIXED EMOTIONS. 20 seconds on the clock starts right now! Mixed emotions… you know, if it was me, I would just guess because that’s why it’s called Best Guess. Take a wild guess because the chances are the people that get it on this clue will probably win more money than people who figure it out by the fifth clue.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Time is up! Did we get any wild guesses? We did! “A Buck” said “emoji”—mixed emotions, emojis are all different emotions. Somebody said “love.” Is love a mixed emotion? Maddie Mama said “this.” I don’t get some of your answers, but you could be right because I’m stupid.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel

More and more of you are joining. “Clean Captain 247” said “Olaf” and “Catamal” said “hair.” It’s not attractive in the sauna.

There is no bad guess. You don’t have to be smart, you don’t have to be educated. The best guess that comes in first could walk away—this could be your living! All right, let’s see what it is.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: That is it for this episode of Best Guess Live! Congratulations again to all the winners. We’re here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific. And don’t forget that next week we’re going to play for—I’m getting close because I don’t believe this—$1 million! It’s going to be absolutely bananas. So tell all your friends and family to come and get their piece of our huge jackpot. Have a great weekend! Goodbye everybody!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! Yes, I’m your host Hunter March. This has got to be the most eagerly anticipated holiday in the history of Mondays because today, as you guys know, is officially the beginning of Million Dollar Week!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Million Dollar Week! I don’t know if you guys can see this but they’re slowly dropping dandruff on me inside the studio. Guys, don’t adjust your phones, you heard me right. Over the course of this week we’ll be playing for $1 million, and today we have $50,000 on the line which is crazy. It’s just going to keep growing all week long leading up to Friday when there will be—hold on to your horses, sit on your seats—a total of up to $500,000.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: That’s insane. I don’t mean to be the math guy, but that’s half a million dollars. What can you buy with half a million dollars? Better question: what can’t you buy with half a million dollars? That’s a lot, and I wish you guys the best of luck.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s how the show works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. After each clue you will get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.text: You can play anywhere, which means you can win anywhere. And here’s some more good news: we are in the middle of our Million Dollar Week! Isn’t that amazing? All week long there’d be escalating jackpots leading up to Friday when we’ll be playing for half a million dollars. That’s boggling my mind. I’m telling you, my mind is boggled.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Guess how much we’re playing for tonight? $100,000! Tonight there’s $100,000 up for grabs. You can stuff a lot of stockings with that. You know, somebody might want to give me a heads up there’s going to be snow, there’s going to be children.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! How we doing? I’m your host Hunter March. Happy holidays to everyone. No matter what you celebrate, we’re excited you’re here. We got players still rolling in. We have almost 40,000 and we just started. But we’re going to give everyone a little bit of time. It’s Christmas Eve. They got their traditions, they got everything.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So while they load in, I want to proudly present a reading on the night before Christmas, Best Guess Edition. It was the night before Christmas here on Best Guess, and the jackpots are growing to astounding excess. As people gather around their cell phones to play, I as host offer up a cool 50K.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: But that is not all. No, we are not done. That’s only the prize for winning round one. If you stick around and win in round two, you may have a hundred grand coming to you. Because around here we do more and not less. Best Guess Live to all and to all of Best Guess!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: With that being said, I think now is an incredible time to win a lot of money. We are in the middle of Million Dollar Week, all leading up to Friday where we’ll all be playing for $500,000. And right now, it’s a lot of money tonight. In case you don’t know, it’s $150,000!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s how the show works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; now it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact right answer, and we do not accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Remember, if possible, take a video of you and your family playing and send it to us on your socials with the hashtag #bestguestlive. But I think it’s time we start giving away some moola! Round one is worth $50,000. Let’s load the first item into the secret ball.

Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; now it could be anything, I mean anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you will have 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Hey! Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host, Howie Mandel. Thank you, thank you, sit down, sit, sit down… you too, sit down! Happy Friday! It’s that time of year—the holidays are over and it feels like there’s nothing left to celebrate. But I got great news: we are here five times a week with something new to celebrate every single day! Yeah! Yes, that’s what I was waiting for! So even though it’s not Christmas or New Year’s, you still got a reason to get this excited—watch this!
(Video clip plays of winners celebrating)

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Oh my god! We won! We won! We won $2,500! Whoa, they won! Those are real people who won real money just by playing Best Guess Live. Thanks to all of them for sharing those videos. And a special shout-out to Charlie—that kid who is doing the worm—it’s his birthday today! Happy birthday to you, Charlie! Oh, you know what? Make sure—listen to me—make sure your parents spend that $2,500 on your present. You tell them Howie said… Howie said that they should!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: And uh, for the rest of you, if you want to celebrate like that too, all you have to do is play our game and win. And then when you win, I want you to videotape yourself. Even if you’re not winning, I want to see you playing and I want you to send us the videos at #BestGuessLive. I want you to tag me. I look at people playing. There’s people—Faded Bagel is here. I can see all of you by the way, live! Faded Bagel 174 is on a player streak. We have Cuban Link 26 is a first-time player. Gruff Roll 846, also a first-time player. So we got some newbies, we got some oldies, but here’s how you do it.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round, we’re going to load the crystal ball with a secret item, and it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue, you’re going to get 20 seconds—listen to this—20 seconds to submit an answer. But you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer, and uh, no typos.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Like last night, I just got an X—I read you all your posts—an X! Somebody wrote down uh “Derby” but didn’t write down “Kentucky.” They were talking the right thing, but that’s why you could have won! Your mom told you—I read what you said—your mom said “write Kentucky” and you didn’t listen! Listen to your mothers, people! Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win the entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Oh, welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m so excited to be back. I’m your host, Hunter March, and I’m here for the first Monday of the year. Now, historically speaking, Mondays get a bad rap. Sure, it’s the end of the fun weekend and the first day of a long work week, but it’s all perspective. Like, if you just look at it like it’s your first chance to play Best Guess Live every week, then Mondays are technically the best. Yeah! And if playing our game isn’t enough to redeem Mondays for you, how about adding $15,000 to the mix? All right, that’s more exciting.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s how it works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round, we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item. Now, it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue, you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact right answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: That’s what you get for giving me two days off last week. Uh, remember, if possible, make a video of you and or your friends playing Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #BestGuessLive. We’ve had some incredibly fun wins, some very funny losses—we’ll accept all of them. And also, right now on twitch.tv/huntermarchshow, you can actually see everyone chatting away. So there’s like a chat box loaded up on your PC so you can play on your phone. All right, if you guys are ready, I’m ready to win some money!

lines.speaker: Hunter March

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! Whoa, voice almost went there. I’m your host, Hunter March. I want to take a second to thank everyone who has gone the extra mile in the Best Guess Live online community. It has been so cool to see. People have been making charts about which clue wins the most, about how much people have won. Someone started a whole blog about the show, which in it they call us the first show built for the AI era, which just sounds awesome—awesome and terrifying. Who knows?

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: But uh, there are lots of people sharing their experiences and their frustrations on several different platforms and we love it. In fact, I just did my first uh Reddit AMA and I may have answered some of the questions that you guys have in your head. So make sure to head over to the Best Guess Live Reddit and check it out. We love that you are actively creating a community around the game. We hope that that community continues to grow. And one sure way to grow a community, if you guys don’t know this, is to just give your community money. So we’re going to keep doing that.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s get rolling. Here’s how Best Guess Live works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item. Now it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer but you only get one “best guess” per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact right answer. And we do not accept typos. lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I love this. I’m back, I’m Howie Mandel. The—you know what the great thing about this game is? You can play it anywhere. Well, almost anywhere, you know. Don’t play it while driving. We’re telling you, on your mobile phones, pull over and play. Or operating a bulldozer. Don’t—don’t pull over and play. Or juggling knives. Put those down and play. But you could play pretty much anywhere else. You can also play while wearing anything you want. You could play in a tuxedo or your underwear or anything in between. You can even like mix it up, like a bikini brief and a bow tie. A boy can dream. That’s what I do.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Anyway, regardless of where you are or what you’re wearing, we are so glad you’re here. And we hope you win. Not only we—I—I hope you win. Subike 595, first time player, I’m rooting for you buddy. Or badess or person or them they. Jeff R Watts, also another first time player. And we have a lot—a big returning group of people too. This is amazing. I—I miss this place. I miss everybody here, but mostly I miss you.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here’s how it works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load a crystal ball with a secret item. That item could be anything. Please call your friends and neighbors—I want to bring more people in here while I’m giving you the rules. Okay? Okay. Then I will give you five clues. After each clue you get 20 seconds to submit an answer but you only get one best guess per round—not per clue. Per round. One per round! Do you hear me? So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer. We won’t accept typos. So, uh, and also choose a nice font.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. Bottom line: you want to be fast but you have to be right. Back up from the bottom line. Remember, if possible, make a video and/or of you or your friends playing Best Guess Live. You guys aren’t doing this a lot, but we’re going to put together some promos of some of the people that you did do. And I’d like to talk to some of the winners. You know, DM me on Instagram, but send it to us and tag #BestGuessLive because we want to spread the word everywhere. We really do. And to my friend Jeff, who couldn’t make it today because he’s going to be to me—I hope you’re feeling better.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! That’s right, I’m your host, Hunter March. Happy Friday! We’ve all put in a long, arduous week and we’re on the verge of the weekend. But before we go into full relax mode and shut our brains off for a couple of days, you guys should keep yours on just long enough to play our game. Because tonight, like every night, we’ve got $15,000 up for grabs. Someone won $10,000 last night—I don’t know if you guys were here, that was crazy.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s how the show works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with the secret item. Now, it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So, make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact right answer. We don’t accept typos. Also, all my friends make—they can rehearse this whole thing to me and they do, they just repeat it back to me. So I realize I’m repetitive, but it’s so you guys understand. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. And remember, if possible—I’m a broken record—make a video of you and/or your friends playing Best Guess Live. A mom, a dad, a son, a daughter, best friend, whatever. Send it to us with the hashtag #BestGuessLive. You can send it to me at @HunterMarch and I will happily share it with the world.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! Yeah, that’s right, I’m your host, Hunter March. Great news everybody—it’s Monday! The long, arduous weekend is finally over. Sure, the weekend did have some amazing NFL playoff games and the Golden Globe ceremony, which was cool, and a lot of us didn’t have to go to work, but the weekend is always the worst part of the week because there’s no Best Guess Live, right? Can’t win money on the weekends.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: But now, actually, you have 10 chances to take our money before you have to suffer through another weekend. Thank god it’s Monday! That’s what I always say. Vote for more Mondays! And I have some incredible news that will make you even happier: starting this week, every Wednesday on Best Guess Live is going to be Wild Wednesday! What makes it wild, you ask? So I’ll tell you what makes it wild: well, we’re going to double the jackpots on Wednesday! Every Wednesday we will be playing for $30,000! Just a little something from Netflix to help you get over the midweek blues.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Get excited! But first, let’s get this magnificent Monday underway. Here’s how the game works: Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with the secret item. Now it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. That’s 5,000 then 10,000. Then on Wednesday it’s even more!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. And remember, if possible, make a video. You guys—you’re playing with your friends, playing with your family. Your brother gets it wrong—that’s hysterical! Send it to us with the hashtag #BestGuess. He thinks his life’s going to change and he gets it wrong—great! He wins—even better. Let’s win some money! lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Howie Mandel. Guess what? It’s Friday. We know that you’re probably very sad that the Best Guess Live week is ending, but before you have to suffer through two whole days without us, I have $15,000 up for grabs right now to help make your weekend bearable. You want some? Do you want some? Well, here’s how you get it. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, and each round has one puzzle. Before each round, we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything. Then I’m going to give you five clues, and after each clue, you’re going to have 20 seconds to submit an answer. But you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock in your answer. It has to be the exact answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win the entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you got to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing and Best Guess Live playing this and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #bestguesslive or even copy me on it and I will repost it. All right, let’s win some money!

lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! How’s it going? How’s everybody doing? I’m your host Hunter March. I don’t know if you saw the show yesterday but we had Anthony Anderson here and it was chaotic in the best way. And as if that weren’t enough fun, tomorrow is Wild Wednesday where, as you know, we double our prize pots to $30,000! It’s a lot of money.

It is Tuesday now. We may not have any famous guests or crazy themes today but we do have one thing that I know you love most about this game: a big pile of money. There’s $15,000 up for grabs. Here’s how you can get your share. Sing along if you know the words: Here’s how the game works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything. Then it’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock in your answer. It has to be the exact answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. And remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing Best Guess Live. Send it to us at Netflix Games at Hunter March, I love sharing it… they love sharing it. Share it with the hashtag #bestlive, we’ll find it.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Hello hello, I am your host Hunter March. It’s going to be a fantastic Friday for a lot of reasons. One, we got some great people playing: “Earthf” who is actually last game’s winner, “Rahrrah Redhead” two-day player streak, “Hyperbinder” one of our first time players, and then someone named “Danielle” who just seems nice.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Listen, we got something special for you. Everyone who submits an answer right or wrong on our second puzzle is going to win an amazing offer from our friends at Good Ranchers, an amazing company that delivers 100% American high-quality meats right to your door. It’s meat day here on Best Guess Live or as they say in Latin, Carnead!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: If you love chicken, steaks, bacon, wild-caught salmon, or know someone who does, make sure you play our second round because we have something for everybody. Oh yeah, also forgot to mention this: $15,000 up for grabs.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go over the rules. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer, and we do not accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast but you have to be right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing Best Guess Live. Send it to us or tag us on your socials with the hashtag #bestlive. With that being said, let’s win some money! Round one is worth $5,000.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round one is worth $5,000. Let us load the crystal ball. Good luck. Clue number one: ALWAYS UNDER ATTACK. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. ALWAYS UNDER ATTACK. What could it be? If you guys are first time players tonight, best of luck. Returning players, even better luck. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one was ALWAYS UNDER ATTACK. “Ceruan Marmet 8” said Pokemon. They’re always under attack. “Goofy Mut 311” said bowling pins.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: EXPERT AT COUNTER DEFENSE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. ALWAYS UNDER ATTACK, EXPERT AT COUNTER DEFENSE. Pokemon are pretty good at counter defense. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: EXPERT AT COUNTER DEFENSE was clue number two. “Fuzzy Rooster 973” said cats. They think they’re always under attack but I’m just trying to love them. “On the Mark 680” said the Seattle Seahawks.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: I’LL TAKE A SLICE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. I’LL TAKE A SLICE. If the answer is still Pokemon that is really, really messed up. 7 seconds left. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Kelly Knows Best 545” said heart surgeon. “Online Jet 924” said pizza. Two more clues though that could rule them out.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: WHERE MEATS MEET AND GET CHOPPED TO EAT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Now I gave you guys a big secret about how the game works. The last clue especially is going to rhyme. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Lhoos” from Simi Valley said butcher. “Nosy Bunny” said Arby’s. Let’s go to clue number five.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five is: A WOODEN LAYER FOR THE CULINARY SLAYER. There’s your rhyme. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. 51,085 players right now. Time is up. Let’s find out what’s inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was a CUTTING BOARD. The only difference between a board and a CUTTING BOARD is a knife.
Clue 5: "A WOODEN LAYER FOR THE CULINARY SLAYER." Cutting boards are often wood and are often used by chefs. 4,486 got it right.
Clue 4: "WHERE MEATS MEET AND GET CHOPPED TO EAT." That's a cutting board. 2,487 got it right.
Clue 3: "I'LL TAKE A SLICE." Well it willingly volunteers to take a slice from your knife. 867 got it right.
Clue 2: "EXPERT AT COUNTERDEFENSE." Well it defends your counter from damage. 406 got it right.
Clue 1: "ALWAYS UNDER ATTACK." While a cutting board is constantly underneath chopping knives it is always under attack. 22 got it right.
Clue 1: 22 winners at $227.27 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round number two. The prize doubles to $10,000. 53,000 people playing for a lot of money and a lot of meat. Let us load the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one: AN AMAZING STAND UP. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. 5 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one was AN AMAZING STAND UP. “Howie Fan Forever” said Howie Mandel. “Spicy Dumpling 15” said ladder.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: GOODLOOK BUT NO PERSONALITY. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Howie’s got personality! Every time Howie and I hang out I am genuinely cracking up. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Sienna Bear 23” said mirror. “House Party Hillary” said statue of David.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: OPEN ARMED BUT UNAPPROACHABLE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. AN AMAZING STAND UP, GOODLOOK BUT NO PERSONALITY, OPEN ARMED BUT UNAPPROACHABLE. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Bold Danny 211” said Creed. “Baby Glenn 998” said tongs. Let’s move on to clue number four.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: MINDLESS ENTERTAINMENT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. 53,499 players. Good luck. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Ascu Potato 642” said cat. “Super Cooper 454” said guillotine. That’s a great guess.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five is: FARMLAND MANNEQUIN THAT GETS THE BIRDS PANICKING. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. I told you I don’t lie to you, clue number five is going to rhyme. Time’s up. Let’s figure out what it is together.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was a SCARECROW. A terrifying one.
Clue 5: "FARMLAND MANNEQUIN THAT GETS THE BIRDS PANICKING." You guys got that... Clue number five is going to rhyme. 11,215 got it right.
Clue 4: "MINDLESS ENTERTAINMENT." Well in the winner's Wizard of Oz the scarecrow song is If I Only Had a Brain. 142 got it right.
Clue 3: "OPEN ARMED BUT UNAPPROACHABLE." By default Scarecrow pose is arms wide open but they have strong no trespassing vibes. 234 got it right.
Clue 2: "GOOD LOOKING, BUT NO PERSONALITY." Well it serves as a lookout for your crops but isn't actually alive and thus has no personality. 244 got it right.
Clue 1: "AN AMAZING STAND UP." Well all it does all day is stand up and it does an incredible job at it. 163 got it right.
Clue 1: 163 winners at $61.34 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Everyone who submitted an answer is getting a $100 off a Good Rancher subscription and free meat for life! Thank you to everyone at Good Ranchers for these great prizes. We’re here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific. Come back on Monday and don’t forget to bring your best guest! Good night!
👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨 MONDAY, FEBRUARY 9, 2026

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Howie Mandel. Guess what? It’s love week! All week long we are celebrating Valentine’s Day and the upcoming release of a brand new season of Love is Blind. Not to mention that we love all of our contestants, especially you. You know which one I’m pointing at!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: And the best way to spread love is to spread the money. So we’ve got $15,000 up for grabs right now. Wouldn’t you love to win some of that? Well I’d love to tell you how. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: And then I’m going to give you five clues. And after each clue you’re going to have 20 seconds on a clock to submit an answer. But you only get one best guess per round—not per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It’s got to be the exact answer and we don’t accept typos.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Everyone that locks in the correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue you will win the entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast but you have to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you or your friends playing Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #bestguestslive. All right, let’s win some money!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Round one, $5,000. You know what I’d love to do right now? Load that crystal ball with the first secret item. What could it be? Oh we got some first-time players: “Cobalt Quartz 607,” “Sienna Honk 37,” and “Guitar Heroine 21.”

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is your first clue. Clue number one: JUDGEMENT DAY. 20 seconds on the clock is starting right now. JUDGEMENT DAY. I feel the love in the air. 8 seconds on the clock. People are submitting their answers. This is for $5,000. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: JUDGEMENT DAY. “Woody Hook 862” said court. That is the place of judgment day.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is clue number two: MUTUAL AGREEMENT. 20 seconds on the clock right now. The first clue was JUDGEMENT DAY, and almost 8,000 people guessed what that answer would be. The second clue was MUTUAL AGREEMENT. 3, 2, 1. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Johnny on the Clock” said a handshake. That’s a mutual agreement. Judgment day—well when it comes to me, I judge all your hands. They’re filthy!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is clue number three: DOUBLE CHECK THE CONNECTION. The clock starts now. 20 seconds. First clue was JUDGEMENT DAY, the second clue was MUTUAL AGREEMENT, and your third clue was DOUBLE CHECK THE CONNECTION. 17,000 people guessed. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Final clue: INITIAL TEST TO SEE IF WE HAVE ROMANTIC CHEMISTRY. Clock starts now. JUDGEMENT DAY, MUTUAL AGREEMENT, DOUBLE CHECK THE CONNECTION, DECIDES IF IT WILL BE TWO FOR TWO, and your final clue was INITIAL TEST TO SEE IF WE HAVE ROMANTIC CHEMISTRY. Time is up. All your guesses are in.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It is a FIRST DATE. It is a FIRST DATE for $5,000! Let’s take a look at how the clues fit.
Clue 5: "INITIAL TEST TO SEE IF WE HAVE ROMANTIC CHEMISTRY." Well it's the first chance to see if you think we may hit it off with another person. That's a test. 2,342 got it right.
Clue 4: "DECIDES IF IT WILL BE TWO FOR TWO." The two of you will decide if there's a second date... It's got to be two for two. 143 got it right.

Clue 1: 2 winners at $5,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: That is it for this edition of Best Guess Live! Congratulations again to all of our winners. We’re here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific. And don’t forget that Love Week continues tomorrow! Don’t forget to bring your best guest! Good night!

lines.text: “The Sun God” from Mountain Home, Arkansas said electron. “Emily 555” from Yukon, Pennsylvania said Bachelor. Not me, I’m just saying I know people.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: START BY POKING ME IN THE EYE LET. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. I do wonder how many people just put love on clue number one and crossed their fingers. At this point love itself might be out. 3 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Noisy Library 321” said The Three Stooges. “Unicorn 137” from Corpus Christi said ring. “Sacred Jazz” said belt—another eyelet.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: STRING FOR YOUR FOOTWEAR TO MAKE IT STAY PUT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. We made it rhyme. SINGLE AND READY TO MINGLE, OPPOSITES ATTRACT, ALWAYS YEARNING TO TIE THE KNOT, START BY POKING ME IN THE EYE LET, STRING FOR YOUR FOOTWEAR TO MAKE IT STAY PUT. Time is up. Let’s find out what was inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was a SHOELACE. The question is who got it right on what clue.
Clue 5: "STRING FOR YOUR FOOTWEAR TO MAKE IT STAY PUT." String for your footwear to make it stay put... and we made it rhyme. 6,679 got it right.
Clue 4: "START BY POKING ME IN THE EYE-LET." You lace up your shoes by inserting them into the eyelets. 3,596 got it right.
Clue 3: "ALWAYS YEARNING TO TIE THE KNOT." That one's obvious they're always looking to tie a knot. 2,950 got it right.
Clue 2: "OPPOSITES ATTRACT." Starts on opposite sides of your shoe and then ends up intertwined and the opposite sides of the lace itself. 12 got it right.
Clue 1: "SINGLE AND READY TO MINGLE." It is a single piece of material that mingles with itself. That's why the answer is shoelace. 17 got it right.
Clue 1: 17 winners at $588.23 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The prize right now is going to double to $20,000. It’s a lot of money. Let us load the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here is your first clue. Clue number one: REACH FOR THE STARS. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. $20,000! On Wednesdays we do it one and a half times. 3 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: REACH FOR THE STARS was clue number one. “Hono Sosa” said yoga. “Harsh Yarn 394” said yawn.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: APPETIZER ANYONE? 20 seconds on the clock starts now. APPETIZER ANYONE? There’s a question mark at the end. 5 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Alpha Ash 4” from Winchester, New Hampshire said fondue. “Big Pastry” said TMZ.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: WILDLY INTERACTIVE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. REACH FOR THE STARS, APPETIZER ANYONE, and WILDLY INTERACTIVE. 7 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Mu Kimu” said poker. “Frozen Combo 876” said kite. “Panda Mandy” said kissing. Definitely wildly interactive.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: UP CLOSE AND HAIRY IF YOU DARE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. REACH FOR THE STARS, APPETIZER ANYONE, WILDLY INTERACTIVE, UP CLOSE AND HAIRY IF YOU DARE. 2 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Happy Shoes 021” said waxing. Waxing is wildly interactive, but if it’s your appetizer, what’s the entree?

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: PAY FOR YOUR KIDS TO BE THE GOAT AT TOUCHING GOATS. Your final 20 seconds starts now. Partners in this! REACH FOR THE STARS, APPETIZER ANYONE, WILDLY INTERACTIVE, UP CLOSE AND HAIRY IF YOU DARE, PAY FOR YOUR KIDS TO BE THE GOAT AT TOUCHING GOATS. Let’s find out what’s been inside this crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was a PETTING ZOO. They’re stuffed animals!
Clue 5: "PAY FOR YOUR KIDS TO BE THE GOAT AT TOUCHING GOATS." For a small price you can pay for your kids to pet some interesting creatures including goats. 10,321 got it right.
Clue 4: "UP CLOSE AND HAIRY IF YOU DARE-Y." I don't want to know what you put besides petting goat or petting zoo. 280 got it right.
Clue 3: "WILDLY INTERACTIVE." You are literally interacting with wild animals it's great. 83 got it right.
Clue 2: "APPETIZER ANYONE." Petting zoos almost always give you a snack to give the animals as a treat.
Clue 1: "REACH FOR THE STARS." At any zoo the animals are the stars and at a petting zoo you can actually reach out and touch them.
Clue 3: 83 winners at $240.96 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: That is it for this episode of Best Guess Live! We’re here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific, and Love Week continues tomorrow. Congratulations Jim, Frank McKe, Gone Camping, and a bunch more. Don’t forget to bring your best guests! Good night!

clues: IF YOU PULL THE LEVER IT BETTER BE CLEVER
OPENING SCRIPT TO GET A NUMBER OR ZIP

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Howie Mandel. Yes, guess what? It’s day four of love week! We are celebrating Valentine’s Day and the new season of Love is Blind, and of course we’re also celebrating the greatest love of all: the love between a host and his contestants. We have some new ones: “Holy Time 394,” I love you! And “Prickly Armor 439,” I love you!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: So as an expression of how much I love all of you, I’m offering up $15,000 to be won today. You’d love to win it, I’d love to help. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Then I’m going to give you five clues. And after each clue you’re going to have 20 seconds on the clock to submit an answer. But you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It’s got to be an exact answer and we don’t accept typos.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Everyone that locks in the correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue you will win the entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast but you got to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #bestlive. All right, round one is worth $5,000!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Round one: $5,000. Load that crystal ball. Here is clue number one: SPECIAL DELIVERY. 20 seconds on the clock starts right now. Have you guys done all your shopping for Valentine’s Day? Taking my wife to see a show—it’s me at the Saboba Casino because it’s free. 3, 2, 1 seconds left. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number one was SPECIAL DELIVERY. “Danny Diamond” said a newborn. “No Boy Man 05” said Amazon.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is clue number two: A RISKY STARTUP. The clock starts now. Your first clue was SPECIAL DELIVERY, 13,000 guesses on that first one. Your second clue is A RISKY STARTUP. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Lenny For You” thoughts: a garage band. “Day 05” said labor.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number three: IF YOU PULL THE LEVER IT BETTER BE CLEVER. Clock starts now. SPECIAL DELIVERY, A RISKY STARTUP, and clue number three: IF YOU PULL THE LEVER IT BETTER BE CLEVER. Less people are guessing as the clues go on. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Fluffy Concrete 321” said an injector seat. “Michelle 676767” said slots.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number four: OPENING SCRIPT TO GET A NUMBER OR ZIP. Clock starts now. SPECIAL DELIVERY, A RISKY STARTUP, IF YOU PULL THE LEVER IT BETTER BE CLEVER, and clue number four: OPENING SCRIPT TO GET A NUMBER OR ZIP. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Zany Pyramid 228” said cold call. “Gloomy Rainbow 720” said a job interview. Here’s your final clue.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Final clue: CHEESEY FIRST WORDS DECIDE YOUR FATE FOR A DATE. The clock starts now. SPECIAL DELIVERY, A RISKY STARTUP, IF YOU PULL THE LEVER IT BETTER BE CLEVER, OPENING SCRIPT TO GET A NUMBER OR ZIP, and CHEESEY FIRST WORDS DECIDE YOUR FATE FOR A DATE. Time is up. 5,000 people guessed on the final clue.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: The answer is PICKUP LINE! And I wanted you to know the answer because you are fine!
Clue 5: "CHEESY FIRST WORDS DECIDE YOUR FATE FOR A DATE." Cringy first words to decide your romantic future. 3,925 got it right.
Clue 4: "OPENING SCRIPT TO GET A NUMBER OR ZIP." If it works out you might get a phone number and if it doesn't zip nada nothing. 2,215 got it right.
Clue 3: "IF YOU PULL THE LEVER IT BETTER BE CLEVER." If you decide to go ahead and use one it better be witty and charming. 185 got it right.
Clue 2: "A RISKY STARTUP." A bold way to open up a conversation with lots of potential peril. 97 got it right.
Clue 1: "SPECIAL DELIVERY." A line you deliver to someone that you think is special and it's all about the delivery. 25 got it right.
Clue 1: 25 winners at $200.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It is time to play round two. The prize doubles to $10,000! Load that crystal ball. The first clue: GET IN SHAPE. The clock starts now. This is for $10,000!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: GET IN SHAPE. “Matcha Fanatic 555” said Times Square. “Take A Hike You Freak” said Lego.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number two: SPIN CLASS. The clock starts now. GET IN SHAPE was the first clue. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Dandy Daniel 430” said washing machine school. “Bean Dad” said twister.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here’s clue number three: THE POINT IS THE POINT. The clock starts now. GET IN SHAPE, SPIN CLASS, and THE POINT IS THE POINT. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Volatile Hugger 909” said an arrow. “Medium Crow 491” said ballet—you get in shape, you spin, you got to dance on point.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is your fourth clue: MOSTLY A NUMBER TWO OPTION. The clock starts now. GET IN SHAPE, SPIN CLASS, THE POINT IS THE POINT, and MOSTLY A NUMBER TWO OPTION. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Best Betsy 211” said fiber. That’s going right through me!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Final clue: GRINDS THE EDGE OF YOUR LEAD SO YOU CAN WRITE RIGHT. The clock starts now. GET IN SHAPE, SPIN CLASS, THE POINT IS THE POINT, MOSTLY A NUMBER TWO OPTION, and GRINDS THE EDGE OF YOUR LEAD SO YOU CAN WRITE RIGHT. Time is up. Let’s find out what’s in the crystal ball!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It’s a PENCIL SHARPENER.
Clue 5: "GRINDS THE EDGE OF YOUR LEAD SO YOU CAN WRITE RIGHT." Makes your pencil nice and sharp so you can write right. 3,267 got it right.
Clue 4: "MOSTLY A NUMBER TWO OPTION." It is usually used on a number two style pencil. 717 got it right.
Clue 3: "THE POINT IS THE POINT." I think you get the point hello. 536 got it right.
Clue 2: "SPIN CLASS." It spins that's how it sharpens and when do you use them most often in class. 1 got it right.
Clue 1: "GET IN SHAPE." Its sole job is to get the pencils in the right shape. 2 got it right.
Clue 1: 2 winners at $5,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: That is it for this edition of Best Guess Live! Congratulations again to all of our winners. We are here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific. There’s only one day left of Love Week, so come back tomorrow! Good night! I wasn’t that sharp tonight—I was a little dull!
