lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Hunter March. Today is an interesting day. Not only is it the last day of Love Week and not only is it our 50th episode, but it’s also Friday the 13th! No, no. Listen, traditionally this day is associated with bad luck and being murdered at summer camp. But we’re not going to let superstition slow us down around here.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Any Friday 13th or otherwise should be celebrated as another chance to win up to $15,000. So let’s turn that bad luck upside down and get this game started. Here’s how the game works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: And then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer but you only get one best guess per round. Not per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer and we do not accept typos.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue you will win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast but you have to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #bestguesslive.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: With that being said, I hope my name helps you guys win more money tonight. Round one is worth $5,000. Let’s load the crystal ball with the first secret item.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round one is worth $5,000. Here comes clue number one: TOP TIER. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Nearly 40,000 people in this game early, I love it. A lot of things are top tier, but the question is what are we talking about. 3 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one was TOP TIER. “Paris Goat” said pearl. “Black Widow LJ” said MVP. “Salty Blueberry” said the good booze.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go to clue number two: BEEN THERE DONE THAT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. TOP TIER, BEEN THERE DONE THAT. Those are your first two clues. 42,000 plus people playing. 3 seconds left. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: BEEN THERE DONE THAT. “Brandy Nicole 27” from Battle Creek, Michigan said AOL. “Queen of Ash” said wedding. “Frank the Tank” from Dallas, Texas said divorce. I’ll be there in Dallas next week.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go to clue number three: TWO FOR THE AGES. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. TOP TIER, BEEN THERE DONE THAT, TWO FOR THE AGES. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: TWO FOR THE AGES. “Meep 0219” had said wine. “Frank B” said twins.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s move on to clue number four: YOUR TEACHERS TEACHERS. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. TOP TIER, BEEN THERE DONE THAT, TWO FOR THE AGES, YOUR TEACHERS TEACHERS. 8 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: YOUR TEACHERS TEACHERS. “Silent Mage” from Newark said the past. “Hollywood017” said mentor. We got one more clue that might rein it in for a lot of people.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: YOUR MOM AND DAD’S DAD AND MOM ARE THE BOMB. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. That clue was a tongue twister! TOP TIER, BEEN THERE DONE THAT, TWO FOR THE AGES, YOUR TEACHERS TEACHERS, and YOUR MOM AND DAD’S DAD AND MOM ARE THE BOMB. Time is up. Let’s find out what was inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was GRANDPARENTS. I love my GRANDPARENTS. Love week GRANDPARENTS, I love it.
Clue 5: "YOUR MOM AND DAD'S DAD AND MOM ARE THE BOMB." Your mom and dad's mom and dad or dad and mom are the bomb. 9,062 got it right.
Clue 4: "YOUR TEACHERS TEACHERS." Well hopefully they taught your parents and hopefully your parents taught you. 1,192 got it right.
Clue 3: "TWO FOR THE AGES." Typically they're highly revered and they are old. It's not offensive empirically true. 69 got it right.
Clue 2: "BEEN THERE DONE THAT." They're obviously very experienced in life they've been there they've done that. 16 got it right.
Clue 1: "TOP TIER." They are at the top of the family tree they're the top tier of the family tree.
Clue 2: 16 winners at $312.50 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The prize doubles to $10,000! One more chance, $10,000 on the line. Let us load the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Here’s your first clue. Clue number one: GO TO THE STORE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. GO TO THE STORE. Have some fun with this. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: GO TO THE STORE. “JD Dimensions” from Houston, Texas said mall. “Online Hill 733” said list. “Luke But Don’t Touch” said Spencer’s Gifts.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go to clue number two: TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. GO TO THE STORE, TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT. One second left. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT. “Nadian Fincher” from South Carolina said ring. “Sam on Ride 91” said a penny. Take it or leave it, for sure.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: TALK TO THE HAND. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. GO TO THE STORE, TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT, and then TALK TO THE HAND. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: TALK TO THE HAND. “Happy Biscuit 214” said psychic—maybe a palm reader. “Mimi Ku 0126” said mom.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: ELECTRONIC BLACK HOLE WHERE CALLERS BEAR THEIR SOUL. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. This is going to give it away to some people. ELECTRONIC BLACK HOLE WHERE CALLERS BEAR THEIR SOUL. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: ELECTRONIC BLACK HOLE WHERE CALLERS BEAR THEIR SOUL. “Exotic Cougar 611” from Maine said spam. “Mighty Carpet” said talk radio.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: A MESSAGE AT THE TONE IF YOU DON’T PICK UP THE PHONE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. GO TO THE STORE, TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT, TALK TO THE HAND, ELECTRONIC BLACK HOLE WHERE CALLERS BEAR THEIR SOUL, A MESSAGE AT THE TONE IF YOU DON’T PICK UP THE PHONE. Time is up. Let’s find out what’s in the $10,000 crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was VOICEMAIL. I’m just kidding about sending my grandma to voicemail, she is dead!
Clue 5: "A MESSAGE AT THE TONE IF YOU DON'T PICK UP THE PHONE." You guys get that one a message at the tone if you don't pick up the phone. 6,294 got it right.
Clue 4: "ELECTRONIC BLACK HOLE WHERE CALLERS BEAR THEIR SOUL." Well you can say whatever is on your mind on a voicemail and do we really know where they go. 1,256 got it right.
Clue 3: "TALK TO THE HAND." You traditionally hold your phone in your hand when you're leaving a voicemail so technically you talked to the hand. 1 got it right.
Clue 2: "TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT." You could be receiving a voicemail or you could be leaving one. Take a voicemail leave a voicemail. 1 got it right.
Clue 1: "GO TO THE STORE." Voicemail though is where your messages get stored. That's the store we're talking about.
Clue 2: 1 winner at $10,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: That’s it for this edition of Best Guess Live! Congratulations again to all of our winners. We’re here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific. Have a great weekend and a lovely Valentine’s Day! Don’t forget to bring your best guest! Good night!

clues: DA VINCI'S LEADING LADY OF THE LOUVRE
SOME SAY IT'S DUMB TO CATCH A FREE RIDE WITH YOUR THUMB

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! I’m your host Hunter March. Mondays are always great because it means we’re kicking off a new week of Best Guess Live. But today is especially great because I get to announce some very exciting news.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Tomorrow, in honor of Lunar New Year, we are going to be blessing our contestants with extra prosperity in the form of bigger prize pots. In round one we’ll be playing for $8,888. You think that’s great? In round two we’re playing for $18,888! Which is very exciting.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: And then as always Wednesday we will be wild, and we’re going to double our prize pots to $30,000. Last one… just kidding, not the last one. On Thursday I’ll be hosting the show live from Netflix House in Dallas, Texas where we will be giving away the same amount of money we normally do. And it will be our first ever on-location episode. I cannot wait to meet some of you! If you’re in Texas or I think Oklahoma’s close, drive in, have fun, let’s do it!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: First things first though, let’s get this Monday underway and put $15,000 up for grabs. Here’s how it works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; now it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you’ll win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. Let’s win some money!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round one is worth $5,000. Let’s load the crystal ball with the first secret item. Tens of thousands of people playing. Here comes clue number one: LOVES TO HANG OUT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: LOVES TO HANG OUT. The game has started. If you’re brand new, welcome. If you’re a returning player, thank you guys so much. We hope this makes your Monday a little bit more fun as we potentially give you lots and lots of money. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one: LOVES TO HANG OUT. “LG LJ Bass” said sloth. “Cheese Jake” said monkey. We’ll see if it holds.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: INSANE AMOUNT OF VIEWS. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. INSANE AMOUNT OF VIEWS. Let me think about this. All right, I’m racking my brain right now for everything that has an insane amount of views. Oh, and then it clicks! I already know the answer. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Unusual Sky 431” said bat. “J Animation” said socks. “Jolly Molly 623” said Hunter’s Instagram—that actually is a good answer.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go to clue number three: HAS WANDERING EYES. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. I really hope it’s not my Instagram now. I do feel like bats have weird wonky wandering eyes a little bit, so maybe bats are back in. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Pebbly Squash 862” from Ansonia, Connecticut said owl. “Flakes of the Snow One” said dog. The question is, is dog gonna get you the right answer?

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four might reveal a little more: A TRUE RENAISSANCE WOMAN. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Okay, A TRUE RENAISSANCE WOMAN rules out dogs, bats. My Instagram is still in! Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Strange Legacy” from Reynoldsburg, Ohio put Medusa. I think she’s pre-Renaissance by thousands of years. “Gilded Wine 993” said “I don’t know, we’ll see if that works.” “Watery Pillow” said Beyonce.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Final clue. Clue number five: DA VINCI’S LEADING LADY OF THE LOUVRE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Let’s go over all the clues. LOVES TO HANG OUT, INSANE AMOUNT OF VIEWS, HAS WANDERING EYES, A TRUE RENAISSANCE WOMAN, and DA VINCI’S LEADING LADY OF THE LOUVRE. Time’s up. Let’s find out what was inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was the MONA LISA. Da Vinci’s masterpiece. One of the only paintings Da Vinci actually finished.
Clue 5: "DA VINCI'S LEADING LADY OF THE LOUVRE." One of the most famous paintings of all time and it's currently hung at the Louvre. 5,921 got it right.
Clue 4: "A TRUE RENAISSANCE WOMAN." Well Mona Lisa is an iconic Renaissance painting. 3,944 got it right.
Clue 3: "HAS WANDERING EYES." An interesting thing about the Mona Lisa her eyes seem to follow you. 566 got it right.
Clue 2: "INSANE AMOUNT OF VIEWS." Many people come to see this iconic painting every single year. It's one of the most viewed things ever. 90 got it right.
Clue 1: "LOVES TO HANG OUT." Well the painting hangs on the wall of the Louvre. 13 got it right.
Clue 1: 13 winners at $384.61 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s play round two. The prize doubles to $10,000. Let’s load the crystal ball. Five clues, 20 seconds, only one best guess. Let us begin.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one: ARGUABLY POSITIVE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. ARGUABLY POSITIVE. It’s an interesting precursor word there. Time is up. “Shamrock Law” said salad. “Bleak Mixer 821” said emoji.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go to clue number two: PATIENCE IS A VIRTUE. 20 seconds on the clock starts… now. You see what I did? You had to be a little patient there. That was a test. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Almost 10,000 guesses right there. “Bright Piano 555” said the DMV. “Blessed 0331” said time. “Corn Doggy 4” said yoga.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s move on to clue number three: THE ORIGINAL SIDE HUSTLE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. I feel like all I can think about are like the things my dad said he did as a kid to make money. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Bronto Samus” said eBay. “Horn City 603” from Victorville, California said love. “Jane Event 757” said Cha-Cha Slide. That is a good slide hustle.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s go to clue number four: COLD SHOULDERS ON THE SHOULDER. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Painting was not Da Vinci’s only thing; it took a while to paint it. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Do Know What” said Airbnb. “Sunlit Tide 750” said sales. “Coffee Table Brooks” said dandruff. Clue five will tell all.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: SOME SAY IT’S DUMB TO CATCH A FREE RIDE WITH YOUR THUMB. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. Guys, we don’t drop the ball when it comes to clue five rhymes! Time’s up. Let’s see what was inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The answer was HITCHHIKER. HITCHHIKING. Now let’s see how the clues fit.
Clue 5: "SOME SAY IT'S DUMB TO CATCH A FREE RIDE WITH YOUR THUMB." Well you hitchhike using your thumb and it may not be the best idea. 9,845 got it right.
Clue 4: "COLD SHOULDERS ON THE SHOULDER." You're often rejected when you're hitchhiking on the shoulder of the road. 328 got it right.
Clue 3: "THE ORIGINAL SIDE HUSTLE." You have to hustle to hitchhike and you are doing it from off to the side of the road. 12 got it right.
Clue 2: "PATIENCE IS A VIRTUE." It takes a long time to hitch a ride.
Clue 1: "ARGUABLY POSITIVE." You stand giving a thumbs up which is positive but hitchhiking is arguably not positive.
Clue 3: 12 winners at $833.33 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: That’s it for this episode of Best Guess Live! Again, I’m going to be in Dallas this week Thursday. And don’t forget that tomorrow we’re increasing our prize pots for Lunar New Year! Wednesday will be wild, and Thursday again, Netflix House in Dallas, Texas. Do not forget! Come back to celebrate! Bye-bye!

clues: IMPOSSIBLE TO AVOID THE LONG LINES
FESTIVE PROCESSIONS WITH MARCHING BAND SECTIONS
RENOWNED FOR SHORT WALKS AND GIANT LEAPS
A FLOATING ORB THAT CAN HIDE AND ALTERS THE TIDE

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! How’s it going everybody? I’m your host Hunter March. I want to start by wishing everyone out there a very happy Lunar New Year. We hope that this year brings you blessings and prosperity, and we are going to do our best to give you something to celebrate.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Today we are turning our prize pots into prosperity pots. What does that mean? Well, we’re blessing them with more money! In round one the prosperity pot is worth $8,888. And in round two we’re turning it up to $18,888! It could have been $88,000 but that would have been crazy; that would have been way too much money for a Tuesday.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Anyway, after that tomorrow is Wild Wednesday where we’ll be doubling our usual prize pots to $30,000. And then on Thursday I’ll be coming to you live from Netflix House in Dallas, Texas for our first ever episode on the road. It’s just our way of helping you get the new year off to a great start.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So let’s get the game off to a great start and go over the rules. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds. Each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be anything. Then I’ll give you five clues. After each clue you’ll get 20 seconds to submit an answer. But you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer and we do not accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win that entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast but you have to be right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: And remember, if possible, make a video of you and or your friends playing Best Guess Live. Send it to us or tag us on our socials with hashtag #bestlive. With all that being said, I think it’s time we win some money! Round one is worth $8,888. Let’s load the crystal ball with the first secret item.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round one is worth $8,888. Here comes clue number one: WORK IN PROGRESS. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. WORK IN PROGRESS. You got four more clues to go. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one was WORK IN PROGRESS. “Anoa Iowa” said me. Your username is a work in progress! And then “Sea Hag” also… change your username.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: FOLLOW THE SPEED LIMIT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. WORK IN PROGRESS, FOLLOW THE SPEED LIMIT. That person who put “me” is probably freaking out. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two was FOLLOW THE SPEED LIMIT. “Tucker Martin” said ant. I get FOLLOW THE SPEED LIMIT just cuz ants are kind of slow and they follow behind each other. And then someone said “my dad.” What is up with you guys?

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: IMPOSSIBLE TO AVOID THE LONG LINES. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. IMPOSSIBLE TO AVOID THE LONG LINES. Ant is back in! Ant came back hard there. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: IMPOSSIBLE TO AVOID THE LONG LINES. “Thick Frame” said DMV. I think we get a DMV in every single episode.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s move on to clue number four: WHATEVER FLOATS YOUR FLOAT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. WHATEVER FLOATS YOUR FLOAT. Have you ever seen those videos where ants all cling to each other and then they float across rivers? Someone should put ants right now! No, don’t, I’m kidding. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: WHATEVER FLOATS YOUR FLOAT. “Echo Alarm” said vote. “Apple 1313” said a lazy river. That actually really works. Why is it a lazy river? Cuz it’s a work in progress.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Your final clue, your final chance at this $8,888. Clue number five: FESTIVE PROCESSIONS WITH MARCHING BAND SECTIONS. 20 seconds starts now. Keep in mind if you didn’t get it on this one, we’re going to have another puzzle worth $18,888 next. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Sushi OFC” from Lakeport, California put ants. That’s unbelievable but I am in love with it. Let’s see if ants is in the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was A PARADE. Now is it ants? No. Is it better than ants? Definitely not. A PARADE though. Let’s see how the clues fit.
Clue 5: "FESTIVE PROCESSIONS WITH MARCHING BAND SECTIONS." A parade is very festive and often features marching bands. 5,316 got it right.
Clue 4: "WHATEVER FLOATS YOUR FLOAT." Parades offer of course many different types of floats. 2,664 got it right.
Clue 3: "IMPOSSIBLE TO AVOID THE LONG LINES." The entire nature of a parade is just a very long line. I personally don't get the appeal. 53 got it right.
Clue 2: "FOLLOW THE SPEED LIMIT." Parades can only go so fast. Could you imagine an 80 mph parade? Unbelievable. 37 got it right.
Clue 1: "WORK IN PROGRESS." A parade is a lot of people working in union that is constantly making progress... it's moving forward. 19 got it right.
Clue 1: 19 winners at $467.78 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The prize doubles to $18,888. Let us load the crystal ball. You guys know how it works. Clue number one: LOVES THE NIGHT LIFE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. LOVES THE NIGHT LIFE. Not me personally, I’m out. Don’t put me. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one: LOVES THE NIGHT LIFE. “Deep Zit 950” said owl. “Silly Bruce 211” said Paris Hilton. I hosted a podcast with her, she never opened up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: RUN CIRCLES AROUND EVERYONE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. LOVES THE NIGHT LIFE, RUN CIRCLES AROUND EVERYONE. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: RUN CIRCLES AROUND EVERYONE. “Tonnie Marmet 368” said bat. Maybe because bats fly around your head. “Fast Wheelbarrow” said Usain Bolt.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s find out clue number three: NICE VIEW LACKS ATMOSPHERE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. NICE VIEW LACKS ATMOSPHERE. RUN CIRCLES AROUND EVERYONE. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: NICE VIEW LACKS ATMOSPHERE. “Burly Vacuum 845” said Applebee’s. I would say it’s almost the opposite; I’ve never seen an Applebee’s with a view and all it has is atmosphere.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: RENOWNED FOR SHORT WALKS AND GIANT LEAPS. This is going to give it to some people. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. RENOWNED FOR SHORT WALKS AND GIANT LEAPS. 5 seconds left. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Lacy M Fox” from North Platte, Nebraska said cat. Someone else said frogs. “Zach on the Attack” said pole vaulting. What if the answer was ants?

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: This last clue is going to give it to you. Clue number five: A FLOATING ORB THAT CAN HIDE AND ALTERS THE TIDE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. This is your second puzzle of the day. As a reminder, I’ll be in Dallas, Texas tomorrow and Thursday. Time is up. Let’s find out who was right.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was THE MOON.
Clue 5: "A FLOATING ORB THAT CAN HIDE AND ALTERS THE TIDE." A floating orb that can hide in the tide. 1,910 got it right.
Clue 4: "RENOWNED FOR SHORT WALKS AND GIANT LEAPS." Well one small step for man and a giant leap for mankind. 2,255 got it right.
Clue 3: "NICE VIEW LACKS ATMOSPHERE." It has a beautiful view... has no atmosphere. Good luck breathing there. 6,916 got it right.
Clue 2: "RUN CIRCLES AROUND EVERYONE." Well the moon orbits around the Earth aka all of us. 4,373 got it right.
Clue 1: "LOVES THE NIGHT LIFE." The moon, I don't know if you guys know this, it's a night bird. 1,047 got it right.
Clue 1: 1,047 winners at $18.04 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Well done Jules Green, Las Drama, and Zesty Bath 567! That’s it for this edition of Best Guess Live Lunar New Year! Congratulations again to all of our winners. Howie will be here tomorrow for Wild Wednesday when our pots will double to $30,000. And I’ll see you on Thursday live from Netflix House in Dallas! Good night! Happy Lunar New Year everybody!

clues: A SCANDAL THAT IS HARD TO HANDLE
A MYTHICAL FIGURE THAT ADDS TO YOUR FIGURES
WHEN TEETH ARE LOST SHE (WINK WINK) PAYS THE COST
CRATER IS THE HINT AND SOMETIMES HAS LINT
NO DOUBTY IT'S AN INNIE OR AN OUTIE

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Welcome to Wild Wednesday on Best Guess Live! It’s wild! I’m your host Howie Mandel. I love being here on Wild Wednesdays. Double the money means eight times the fun! Don’t bother doing the math, just trust me, it really does… it checks out. I did a lot of work beforehand.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: In just a moment we’re going to have a wild time playing for twice our usual prize pots. And if you think this is wild, make sure you join us tomorrow as well because Hunter is going to be on location at Netflix House in Dallas, Texas. So the question is: which of us hosts has the better assignment? Me helping people win $30,000, or Hunter getting to hang out and shake hands with all of our fans in Dallas? I think you know which way I’m voting.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Anyway, right now I vote we get this game started. Here’s how it works. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be absolutely anything. Then I’m going to give you five clues.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: After each clue you get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer, and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in the correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money, and if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue you will win the entire prize pot for that round.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Bottom line: you want to be fast but you got to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing this game Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #bestguesslive. All right, let’s win some money! It’s Wild Wednesday, round one: 10 grand!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: 10 grand. Load that ball. I’m going to start with clue number one. We have people playing—this is your fifth streak! We got streak players, we got first-time players. Here’s your first clue: DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS. The clock starts now. DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS. This is for $10,000. “Flying Ryan 23” says revolving door. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number two: LITTLE WHITE LIES. The clock starts now. Clue number one was DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS, the second clue is LITTLE WHITE LIES. Over 13,000 submitted guesses. “Golden Grapes 717” said a second family—I’ve left her, I’ve arrived with this new family, and I didn’t tell anybody so it’s a little white lie. “Jesse Martin 274” said a wedding.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number three: A SCANDAL THAT IS HARD TO HANDLE. Clock starts now. First clue was DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS, the second clue was LITTLE WHITE LIES, the third clue is A SCANDAL THAT IS HARD TO HANDLE. 5 seconds left. “Honest 11” said Watergate. “Angry Garden Salad” said lice—oh that’s little white lice!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number four: A MYTHICAL FIGURE THAT ADDS TO YOUR FIGURES. The clock starts now. DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS, LITTLE WHITE LIES, A SCANDAL THAT’S HARD TO HANDLE, and the fourth clue: A MYTHICAL FIGURE THAT ADDS TO YOUR FIGURES. “Cheesy Charlie 222” said leprechaun. “Perky Court 379” said taxes.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Final clue. WHEN TEETH ARE LOST SHE WINK WINK PAYS THE COST. The clock starts now. DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS, LITTLE WHITE LIES, A SCANDAL THAT IS HARD TO HANDLE, A MYTHICAL FIGURE THAT ADDS TO YOUR FIGURES, and the final clue for $10,000 is WHEN TEETH ARE LOST SHE WINK WINK PAYS THE COST. Time is up. Over 44,000 submitted answers. Let’s find out what’s in the crystal ball!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: The answer is THE TOOTH FAIRY. Took you a minute! It’s THE TOOTH FAIRY.
Clue 5: "WHEN TEETH ARE LOST SHE (WINK WINK) PAYS THE COST." The tooth fairy wink wink is the magical wink wink. 13,500 got it right.
Clue 4: "A MYTHICAL FIGURE THAT ADDS TO YOUR FIGURES." A fairy is a mythical figure who happens to exist and she adds to your piggy bank. 939 got it right.
Clue 3: "A SCANDAL THAT IS HARD TO HANDLE." If you have to figure out the right time to delicately share with your kids about the tooth fairy. 86 got it right.
Clue 2: "LITTLE WHITE LIES." Kids teeth are little and white and where do you lie them under your pillow. 64 got it right.
Clue 1: "DEPARTURES AND ARRIVALS." Your teeth depart and money arrives and also your teeth depart and new ones arrive. 1 got it right.
Clue 1: 1 winner at $10,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Let’s play round number two. The prize will now double to $20,000! You know how it works. Load that crystal ball for $20,000. This is amazing!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: First clue: COLLATERAL DAMAGE. The clock starts now. COLLATERAL DAMAGE. Remember you got to spell it correctly too. “Sassy Sheila 24” said an earthquake. “P Ditterton 2” says a mirror—if you break a mirror you have seven years bad luck.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number two: NO PURPOSE ON PURPOSE. The clock starts now. First one was COLLATERAL DAMAGE, the second clue was NO PURPOSE ON PURPOSE. Almost 6,000 people took a guess. “Practical Pam 211” said a reality star. A reality star has no purpose on purpose! I’m going to tell Lisa Rinna that.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number three: AN OBVIOUS DISCONNECT. The clock starts now. COLLATERAL DAMAGE, NO PURPOSE ON PURPOSE, and clue number three: AN OBVIOUS DISCONNECT. “Magic Mike 333” said no Wi-Fi. “True Flute 25” said Lego—you pull them up, you disconnect. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Clue number four: CRATER IS THE HINT AND SOMETIMES HAS LINT. Clock starts now. COLLATERAL DAMAGE, NO PURPOSE ON PURPOSE, AN OBVIOUS DISCONNECT, and your fourth clue: CRATER IS THE HINT AND SOMETIMES HAS LINT. Time is up. “34.92” said your toes.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Final clue. NO DOUBTY IT’S AN INNIE OR AN AUDI. The clock starts now. COLLATERAL DAMAGE, NO PURPOSE ON PURPOSE, AN OBVIOUS DISCONNECT, CRATER IS THE HINT AND SOMETIMES HAS LINT, and the final clue: NO DOUBTY IT’S AN INNIE OR AN AUDI. That’s it. Let’s find out what is inside the crystal ball!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It’s BELLY BUTTON. I used to have an Audi and when I got lint it was like a spool.
Clue 5: "NO DOUBTY IT'S AN INNIE OR AN OUTIE." Belly buttons are innies or Audies. 7,695 got it right.
Clue 4: "CRATER IS THE HINT AND SOMETIMES HAS LINT." It's a small hole where lint sometimes gathers. 13,475 got it right.
Clue 3: "AN OBVIOUS DISCONNECT." It marks the spot where the baby is disconnected from the mother. 30 got it right.
Clue 2: "NO PURPOSE ON PURPOSE." After the cord is cut this has no purpose on purpose belly button has no longer has any active function. 9 got it right.
Clue 1: "COLLATERAL DAMAGE." The intention is to cut the cord and the belly button that is left behind is the incidental consequence.
Clue 2: 9 winners at $2,222.22 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: That is it for the wild edition of Best Guess Live! Congratulations again to all of our winners. We are here every weekday at 8 Eastern and 5 Pacific. Tomorrow Hunter is live on location from Netflix House in Dallas! Come back tomorrow and don’t forget to bring your best guest! Good night!

clues: MIX DILL HERBS AND MAYO AND VEGGIES SAY HEYO
HIDDEN VALLEY MADE VALID TO POUR ON YOUR SALAD
A PRECIOUS WATCH YOU NEED TO TAKE CARE OF
THE PERSON YOU HIRE SO THE KIDS DON'T CONSPIRE

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: How’s it going everybody? Oh man, I’m so excited to be here! Are you guys excited to be here? Your Netflix House is way cooler than I could have imagined. If you love Netflix, this is the place to be!

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: How you feeling, how you doing? If you’ve not been here before, it’s a very fun show. In fact, I think let’s fix what’s on part where we have probably the coolest episode we’ve ever done. I genuinely am excited to play with you. They’re outside right now. By the way, all those people I just saw, they get no extra.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So I’m going to tell you what’s going on out at Netflix House Dallas. We’re playing Best Guess Live! Let’s get this special extra live edition underway. Here’s how the game works. Our crystal ball with a secret item—it could be anything. And then I’ll give you five clues.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer and we don’t accept typos. Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you’re the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win that entire prize pot for that round.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Bottom line: if possible, take a video of you and your friends, your family, whoever playing Best Guess Live. Send it to us or post it on your social with best guess. And in fact, I’m coming out there! Enough talk though, let’s win some money! Round one is worth $5,000. Oh my gosh! A lot of money to give away. Listen, I want everyone to win but it would be kind of cool if someone out there won. So let’s load the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Round one: $5,000. Here comes clue number one: WE’RE NUMBER ONE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. WE’RE NUMBER ONE. All right. There everyone’s locked in right now. They’re all trying to figure it out. 3 seconds left. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one was WE’RE NUMBER ONE. “Haley 173” said Texas. Not today, Haley. “Ronnie” from Cape Coral, Florida said Netflix. “Rainy Jelly 12” said the Seahawks.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: TOP OF ITS FIELD. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. WE’RE NUMBER ONE, TOP OF ITS FIELD. Look at everyone. They’re working together, they’re trying to come up with it. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two was TOP OF ITS FIELD. “Manny Alfred” from Houston, Texas said tree. “Nerd Alert 99” said valedictorian.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: COWBOY BOOTS AND A 10GALLON HAT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. COWBOY BOOTS AND A 10GALLON HAT. Might be a little too on the nose. 3 seconds. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Knickknack” said rodeo. “Cowboy” also a good guess. We’ll see though.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: MIX DILL HERBS AND MAYO AND VEGGIES SAY HEYO. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. WE’RE NUMBER ONE, TOP OF ITS FIELD, COWBOY BOOTS AND A 10GALLON HAT, MIX DILL HERBS AND MAYO AND VEGGIES SAY HEYO. 10 seconds left. I love seeing the kids playing, that’s so fun.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Morvin Boom” from Onalaska, Washington just said mayo. You forgot the other parts of what I just said. Maybe it’s right though.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: HIDDEN VALLEY MADE VALID TO POUR ON YOUR SALAD. Number five starts now. 20 seconds. WE’RE NUMBER ONE, TOP OF ITS FIELD, COWBOY BOOTS AND A 10GALLON HAT, MIX DILL HERBS AND MAYO AND VEGGIES SAY HEYO, HIDDEN VALLEY MADE VALID TO POUR ON YOUR SALAD. Time’s up. Let’s find out what’s been inside that crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was RANCH. Specifically RANCH dressing, but we’ll accept RANCH.
Clue 5: "HIDDEN VALLEY MADE VALID TO POUR ON YOUR SALAD." Hidden Valley is the famous brand that popularized ranch dressing. 9,267 got it right.
Clue 4: "MIX DILL HERBS AND MAYO AND VEGGIES SAY HEYO." That's the recipe. And many people use ranch on a crudité platter. 6,320 got it right.
Clue 3: "COWBOY BOOTS AND A 10-GALLON HAT." That is typically, stereotypically, how you dress on a ranch. 23 got it right.
Clue 2: "TOP OF ITS FIELD." It goes right on top of a bed of lettuce, tomatoes, and many other things that grow in a field. 1 got it right.
Clue 1: "WE'RE NUMBER ONE." Ranch dressing dominates as the most popular salad dressing in America. It's the number one dressing.
Clue 2: 1 winner at $5,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Let’s double the money and play round two. This one is worth $10,000. You only get one best guess. Let’s load the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number one is: IN AND OUT. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. I feel like being in Texas, a lot of people probably think IN AND OUT burger. I don’t know what the Texas alternative is—Whataburger? However you say it, I’m going to get people really mad at me. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “True Rat King” from Little Egg Harbor said toaster. “He Donkey” said burger. “A Time to Bill” said hot tub.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number two: ESSENTIAL LAW ENFORCEMENT. 20 seconds starts now. IN AND OUT and now ESSENTIAL LAW ENFORCEMENT. I don’t know what a toaster does legally, but I do know that it is essential. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Ghastly Synth” from Gilbert, Arizona said a ranger. “Pinky Rue 22” said jail.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number three: HOME NOT ALONE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. HOME NOT ALONE. 10 seconds left. IN AND OUT, ESSENTIAL LAW ENFORCEMENT, HOME NOT ALONE. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Silky Fred 42” put Kevin McCallister. IN AND OUT, he was in and out of those movies.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number four: A PRECIOUS WATCH YOU NEED TO TAKE CARE OF. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. IN AND OUT, ESSENTIAL LAW ENFORCEMENT, HOME NOT ALONE, A PRECIOUS WATCH YOU NEED TO TAKE CARE OF. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: “Classic Amulet 176” said a Rolex. “Wort Spinach” said cat—a precious watch, I guess because you got to watch your cat.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Clue number five: THE PERSON YOU HIRE SO THE KIDS DON’T CONSPIRE. 20 seconds on the clock starts now. We made it rhyme. THE PERSON YOU HIRE SO THE KIDS DON’T CONSPIRE. Get your answer and type it in. Time’s up. Let’s find out what was inside the crystal ball.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: The correct answer was a BABYSITTER.
Clue 5: "THE PERSON YOU HIRE SO THE KIDS DON'T CONSPIRE." The person you hire so the kids don't conspire. 8,921 got it right.
Clue 4: "A PRECIOUS WATCH YOU NEED TO TAKE CARE OF." There's nothing more precious than your children... when you find a good babysitter you want to hold on to them. 262 got it right.
Clue 3: "HOME NOT ALONE." You left your kids at home but thankfully they're not all alone. 216 got it right.
Clue 2: "ESSENTIAL LAW ENFORCEMENT." They are the ones enforcing the law, the rules of the house, while you were gone. 1 got it right.
Clue 1: "IN AND OUT." A babysitter comes in so that you can go out. In and out.
Clue 2: 1 winner at $10,000.00 each.

lines.speaker: Hunter March
lines.text: Thank you so much for playing Best Guess Live! Enjoy the rest of your night. Tomorrow don’t forget, everybody wins! Come back tomorrow, bring your best guest! See you later!

clues: A QUICK INDICATION OF SWEET FLIRTATION
LITERALLY IN THE BLINK OF AN EYE
SPENDS MORE TIME AT GRAMMY'S HOUSE THAN ANYONE

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Welcome to Best Guess Live! I’m your host Howie Mandel. Guess what? It’s Friday! And it is not just any Friday. This is—listen to me—Everybody Wins Friday! I love it when we do this. I want the most people to win as possible. And you can’t have more winners than everybody, right? That’s the math. That math works. You can’t have more than everybody.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: So everyone who plays in round two is going to win a free two-month subscription to personal online fitness training from iit train. Not a discount—you’re getting free for two months. That’s a gift! So that comes in round two. This is a great prize. I’ll tell you a little more about it later on. All you need to know is that if you submit an answer in round two, it doesn’t even have to be right. You will win!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: On top of that, this is unbelievable: we have $15,000 up for grabs. This is going to be a great day for everyone who plays. And here’s how you do it. Each episode of Best Guess Live has two rounds, each round has one puzzle. Before each round we’re going to load our crystal ball with a secret item; it could be absolutely anything.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Then I’ll give you five clues. But remember, the clues are written like riddles—they’re meant to make you think, people! After each clue you will get 20 seconds to submit an answer, but you only get one best guess per round—not one per clue, one per round. Listen to me. So make sure you’re confident before you lock it in. It has to be the exact answer and we don’t accept typos.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Everyone that locks in a correct answer on the earliest clue will share in the money. And if you are the only one to get it right on the earliest clue, you will win the entire prize pot for that round. Bottom line: you want to be fast, but you have to be right. Remember, if possible, make a video of you and your friends playing Best Guess Live and send it to us or tag us on your socials with #bestguess. All right, let’s win some money!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Round one is worth $5,000. Let’s load the crystal ball with the first secret item. What could it be? We’re about to find out. Well, not right away, I’m going to give you the clues first.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here comes clue number one: ONE WAY OR ANOTHER. The clock starts now. 20 seconds on the clock. This is for $5,000 people! And stick around—remember round two everybody’s going to win. And today is a leg day; that’ll make more sense a little later on. Time’s up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: ONE WAY OR ANOTHER. “Golden Disc 882” said a fork. “Glengary Glenn Boss” said the interstate. “All Spice 8” said train.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is your second clue: SUPER FAST. The clock starts now. Clue number one was ONE WAY OR ANOTHER, clue number two is SUPER FAST. 10 seconds left. Almost 8,000 answers already. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: SUPER FAST. “Alabama Bobby 311” said Waffle House—it is super fast! Can you make waffles one way or another? I don’t know how to cook.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here’s clue number three: POSITIVE REINFORCEMENT. The clock starts now. ONE WAY OR ANOTHER, SUPER FAST, and third clue is POSITIVE REINFORCEMENT. Time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Goosey Hammer 498” said loadbearing wall. I guess you can put that in one way or another. And that is POSITIVE REINFORCEMENT.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here is your fourth clue: A QUICK INDICATION OF SWEET FLIRTATION. And the clock starts now. ONE WAY OR ANOTHER was the first clue, second clue was SUPER FAST, the third clue was POSITIVE REINFORCEMENT, and the fourth clue was A QUICK INDICATION OF SWEET FLIRTATION. 2, 1, time is up.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: “Apollo’s Mommy” said Tinder. Apollo must be so proud.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: Here’s clue number five: LITERALLY IN THE BLINK OF AN EYE. And the clock starts now. That was your final clue. ONE WAY OR ANOTHER, SUPER FAST, POSITIVE REINFORCEMENT, A QUICK INDICATION OF SWEET FLIRTATION, and your final clue was LITERALLY IN THE BLINK OF AN EYE. And that was time up. All 37,000 of you guessed. Let’s find out what is in the crystal ball!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It is a WINK. No, it really is. You thought I was kidding, right? It’s a WINK.
Clue 5: "LITERALLY IN THE BLINK OF AN EYE." That is literally what a wink is. 4,815 got it right.
Clue 4: "A QUICK INDICATION OF SWEET FLIRTATION." A wink can be a subtle way to show affection. 3,700 got it right.
Clue 3: "POSITIVE REINFORCEMENT." Whether it indicates a joke a secret or flirting it's usually a positive expression. 2 got it right.
Clue 2: "SUPER FAST." A wink moves very quickly.
Clue 1: "ONE WAY OR ANOTHER." You can wink with either this eye or this eye... one way or another they're both a wink.
Clue 3: 2 winners at $2,500.00 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: In round two everyone who submits an answer is going to win a free two-month subscription from iit train! No equipment needed, workout anytime anywhere. You just have to play. Let’s load the crystal ball. The prize is doubling: $10,000!

lines.text: Here’s your first clue: ONE NAME ONE. And the clock starts now. ONE NAME ONE. 20 seconds on the clock. Regardless of what you do, you are a winner right now. Time is up.

lines.text: “Adam and Eve” said utility. “Frank Twins” said TV 8.

lines.text: Here’s your third clue: A LITTLE BIT COUNTRY. And the clock starts now. ONE NAME ONE, FATEFUL BEGINNINGS, and your third clue with about 10 seconds left is A LITTLE BIT COUNTRY. Time is up.

lines.text: “Stampede” said Vatican City. One name, one… no, I get that. Fateful beginnings? Okay.

lines.text: “Jolly Boots 929” said fruit salad. “Mama Hayes” said Reba. Reba’s one name, I get that.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: And here is your final clue for $10,000: SPENDS MORE TIME AT GRAMMYY’S HOUSE THAN ANYONE. The clock starts now. ONE NAME ONE, FATEFUL BEGINNINGS, A LITTLE BIT COUNTRY, WHEN LIFE GAVE HER LEMONS, and the final clue is SPENDS MORE TIME AT GRAMMYY’S HOUSE THAN ANYONE. Time is up. Let’s find out what’s in the crystal ball!

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: It is BEYONCE. Sing a lady, sing a lady, sing a lady, sing!
Clue 5: "SPENDS MORE TIME AT GRAMMY'S HOUSE THAN ANYONE." She has won a record-breaking 35 Grammys... that is Grammyy's house. 1,821 got it right.
Clue 4: "WHEN LIFE GAVE HER LEMONS...." She made the critically acclaimed album Lemonade. 2,350 got it right.
Clue 3: "A LITTLE BIT COUNTRY." She pivoted into the country music when she put out Cowboy Carter and she's from Texas. 431 got it right.
Clue 2: "FATEFUL BEGINNINGS." Her career started out in the group Destiny's Child. It was Destiny it was Fateful. 61 got it right.
Clue 1: "ONE NAME WON." One name Beyonce... if you put in the correct one name you won. 90 got it right.
Clue 1: 90 winners at $111.11 each.

lines.speaker: Howie Mandel
lines.text: That is it for this Everybody Wins edition of Best Guess Live! Congratulations, every one of you has won something! We’re here every weekday at 8 Eastern, 5 Pacific. Have a great weekend, come back Monday, and don’t forget to bring your best guest! Good night!
